name: PenFed Gold Visa® Card

earning_rates.notes: 1x point per $1 on all purchases (no rewards in traditional sense - primarily a low APR card)

other_benefits.name: Cell phone protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $500 per claim ($50 deductible) for stolen or damaged cell phone when paying monthly wireless bill

other_benefits.name: Travel Accident Coverage
other_benefits.description: Up to $100,000 in travel accident insurance when booking travel with card

other_benefits.name: ExtendedPay Plan
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 15 months on purchases and balance transfers

notes: Primarily a low APR card (0% for 15 months) rather than a rewards card. $0 annual fee, no foreign transaction fees. Cell phone protection up to $500/claim.
